name: hydra-egress-shield
description: OPT-IN BLOCKING PreToolUse egress allowlist. Pairs with hydra-egress-monitor (advisory). When state/egress-policy.json sets enabled:true, blocks WebFetch / WebSearch / Bash-network calls whose destination host is not in the allowlist by exiting 2. Default disabled (no-op). Closes audit finding F-005.
